src: This is the place where the catalyst funded proposal Cardano Ecosystem : Smart Contract Languages Live Support(Oxygen), Documentation and Adoption (https://cardano.ideascale.com/c/idea/112227) open source code, files, etc will be shared with the rest of the Cardano Community
ja: catalyst資金提供プロポーザル「Cardano Ecosystem: Smart Contract Languages Live Support(Oxygen), Documentation and Adoption (https://cardano.ideascale.com/c/idea/112227)」のオープンソースコードやファイルなどをCardanoコミュニティと共有する場所です
